id.description: Unique ID of the deposit destination.

account.description: ID of the account associated with the deposit destination.

allocation_type.description: Whether payments sent to this deposit destination are a percentage or amount of the user's total pay.

currency.description: Currency ([ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)) in which payouts are sent to the deposit destination.

allocation_value.description:
What `percent` or `amount` of the user's pay is being allocated to this deposit destination.

Numerical values are used for *exact* amounts or percentages, and `remainder` is used when this deposit destination is receiving a remainder amount after pay is allocated to all other deposit destinations.

method.description: Payment method, such as direct deposit.

ach_deposit_account.description: Details for deposit destinations with a `destination_type` of `ach_deposit_account`, which pertains to U.S. bank accounts.

account_number.description: Bank account number. May be obfuscated depending on the payroll system.

bank_name.description:
Name of the bank, as returned by the payroll system.

Some payroll systems will override the `bank_name` included in your target deposit destination configuration and instead use a bank name they derive from another source, such as the routing number of the account.

routing_number.description: Routing number of the bank account.

card.description: Details for deposit destinations with a `destination_type` of `card`, which pertains to debit cards or similar cards that can receive payouts.

card_name.description: Card name or vendor. Typically Visa or MasterCard.

is_platform_card.description: Whether the card is directly issued by a platform such as Uber or Lyft.

acss_debit.description: Details for deposit destinations with a `destination_type` of `acss_debit`, which pertains to Canadian bank accounts that use the Automated Clearing Settlement System (ACSS).

account_number.description: Bank account number. May be obfuscated depending on the payroll system.

institution_number.description: 3-digit code that identifies the user's bank.

transit_number.description: 5-digit code that identifies the bank branch.

created_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when the deposit destination object was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp ([ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601)) when a property value of the deposit destination object most recently changed.
